channel.title: Blog on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: Progressive Overload Is Not Just Adding Weight
item.description: Weight on the bar is one variable. Here are the others.

item.title: Building traininglogs: A Python Pipeline for My Gym Data
item.description: How and why I built a parser that turns my messy training notes into structured JSON.

item.title: On Systems Over Goals
item.description: Goals tell you where you want to go. Systems determine whether you get there.

item.title: Testing in Python: What to Test and What to Skip
item.description: Not everything needs a test. Understanding the difference is what makes a test suite useful rather than expensive.

item.title: What I Learned Deploying on Azure for the First Time
item.description: Notes from my first production deployment on Azure — what surprised me, what tripped me up, and what I would do differently.

item.title: A Note-Taking System That Actually Works for Engineers
item.description: Most note-taking systems fail because they optimise for capture, not retrieval. Here is what I do instead.

item.title: Building a Sustainable Training Habit
item.description: How I stopped chasing short-term results and started optimising for repeatability.

item.title: The Deload Week: What It Is and Why Most People Skip It
item.description: A planned reduction in training load is not laziness. It is how you keep accumulating progress over months.

item.title: How I Learn a New Codebase
item.description: A repeatable process for getting up to speed on unfamiliar code quickly.

item.title: What to Eat When Training for Strength
item.description: Nutrition for strength training is simpler than the industry wants you to believe.

item.title: GitHub Actions for Personal Projects
item.description: How I set up lightweight CI/CD for personal projects without overengineering it.

item.title: Sleep Is a Training Variable
item.description: You cannot out-train poor sleep. Treating it as optional is a mistake most lifters make for years.

item.title: Python Dataclasses for Domain Models
item.description: Why I use dataclasses over dicts for domain objects, and the patterns that make them maintainable.

item.title: Why I Started Running (After Years of Avoiding It)
item.description: I spent years treating cardio as optional. Here is what changed my mind.

item.title: Infrastructure as Code: First Principles
item.description: Why IaC is not just about automation, and the principles that make it actually work.
